content.title: Your Configuration JSON is Ready for Export!
content.text:
The Cursed Ark is a PvPvE ASA server with a friendly and active community, rates balanced for a busy life, fair and enforced rules, Quality of Life mods to reduce the needless busy work, a ton of dino mods balanced to vanilla perfection, and weekly events to help you get involved with the community!

The server is also CROSSPLAY!
Meaning everyone on EVERY console can play with each other.

I would recommend joining the Discord, which is linked in this menu. It's where the community interacts the most.


Wipe Info

Wipes occur at no scheduled time.
The Decision to wipe is up to the admin and the date is chosen at random. Questions about future wipe dates will not be answered.

For those who are curious what PvPvE means.

It means that this server is a place for PvP and PvE. Both actions are encouraged.
There will be periods of war and periods of peace, as is with a server where no one is expected to behave in any certain way.
In many ways, this is somewhat of an anarchy server in that regard.

content.title: Server Config
content.text:
Here's a list of all server's rates.

5x Harvest
10x Taming
5x XP
10x Maturation
6 Man Tribe Limit
Unlimited Respecs



Player Skill Rates

2x Food
2x Water
3x Weight
5x Fortitude
1,000x Crafting Skill (The bonus for crafting skill on crafted items is 1/1,000x so this only affects speed)


Dino Stat Rates

3x Stamina
3x Weight


We also have entirely custom Loot Tables.
I can't list the details entirely as there's too many, but the changes mostly consist of making supply drops drop less useless stuff, and adding BBS and modded dino saddles to all tables.
If you have any specific questions regarding Loot Tables feel free to ask me.



Below is a list of all the custom config we have for the mods on the server.
Changes to dino stats and spawn rates are not listed here. Instead they are listed in the Dino Modifications Tab.

Random Configs (Mod)

Mate Boost across variants
Mating across variants
10x longer boss timers
Element transfers
Tribute transfers
Trophy transfers


Pelayori's Cryo Storage

No Cryofridge requirement
Cryochambers don't expire
60 second cryo timer
0.3 second cryo time
5 second cryo time in combat
No Kill or Neuter mode on the cryo gun
Imprint passes to the deployer


Cyber's Structures

Ceilings can go out further without support.
Air Conditioner gives tons of insulation.
Air Conditioner range is 10 foundations.
Personal Teleporter is disabled.
Power generator can power Tek Trough.
No cloning boss/raid dinos.
Campire crafting speed -> 2x.
Chemistry Bench crafting speed -> 20x.
Traits can be cloned.
Imprint can be cloned.
Compost bin production speed -> 5x.
Cooking Pot crafting speed -> 5x.
Smithy crafting speed -> 5x.
Dino scan on transmitter disabled.
Multi tool cannot convert dinos to chibi.
Fabricator crafting speed -> 5x.
Feeding trough max range -> 100 foundations.
Fireplace burning speed -> 20x
Refining forge crafting speed -> 2x.
Generator fuel consumption -> 1/24th.
Hatchery max range -> 50 foundations.
Industrial Forge crafting speed - 5x.
Aggregator range -> 60 foundations.
Large Crop Plot crafting speed -> 3x.
Medium Crop Plot crafting speed -> 2x.
Small Crop Plot crafting speed -> 1x.
Mini Vault slot count -> 300.
Mortar and Pestle crafting speed -> 2x.
Mutator buff cap -> 1.
Assign Gender, Allow Breeding, Imprint, and Boost growth are disabled on the Mutator.
Mutator pulse cost -> 50 element.
Nanny range -> 30 foundations.
Oil Pump generation speed -> 5x.
Dino Scanner, Personal Teleporter, and Teleport Tame are disabled on the Omni-Tool.
Preserving Bin crafting speed -> 5x.
Can clone cloned and neutered dinos.
Converter doesn't require knowing the resulting engram to convert.
Replicator crafting speed -> 100x.
Replicator slot count -> 2,000.
Resource pull range -> 100 foundations.
Tek Laboratory crafting speed -> 20x.
Tek Generator fuel consumption time -> 1 day per element.
Tek Forcefield power up time -> 60 seconds.
Tek Forcefield respawn delay -> 600 seconds/10 minutes.
Tek Stove crafting speed -> 5x.
Tek Trough max range -> 100 foundations.
Tree Sap Tap crafting speed -> 3x.
Turbine max range -> 30 foundations.
Ammo Box range -> 100 foundations.
Auto Turret slot count -> 14.
Heavy Turret slot count -> 58.
Tek Turret slot count -> 5.
Vault slot count -> 1,000.
Wireless Crafting Range -> 20 foundations.
Generator range -> 50 foundations.
Tek Generator range -> 100 foundations.


Der Dino Finder

Blacklisted dinos: Zaldrir Dragons and Helicoprions
Cannot view stats
Only one dino at a time
Unlocked at level 115.


Dragon's Kingdom

Post tame levels are gained.
Dragons have an 80% refusal chance.


Hype's Offline Raid Protection

ORP activates in 10 minutes.
ORP decays in 1 week.
Turrets under ORP have infinite ammo.
Turrets under ORP do 3x damage.
ORP has a radius of 30 foundations.
Turrets under ORP are colored Gold.


Paleo Ark

Conversions are disabled, except for saddles.
EVO Giga cannot go in boss fights.
EVO Giga is not a KO tame.
EVO Rex is not a KO tame.
EVO Giga won't go berserk unless there 100 other EVO Gigas nearby.
Vanilla Therizinos CAN convert to their EVO version.


Solo Farm Mod

Extra weight reduction is disabled.
Weight limit is not respected.
Stamina is not used in farm mode.

content.title: Server Rules (IMPORTANT)
content.text:
(IMPORTANT)
These are the rules for the server.
Read them; not knowing them is not an excuse.



Social Rules

The rules here also apply to the Discord.
1. Don't be racist/sexist/homophobic/etc....
2. Do not post/create NSFW/NSFL ANYWHERE!
3. Do not Dox another user.
4. Do not spam the chat.
5. If you are a bot you WILL be banned. Or if you try and advertise something.
6. DO NOT ask staff about when a wipe is occurring. These dates are set in secret so no players know them. No questions regarding this topic will be answered.



Building Rules

1. No blocking off Obelisks, player spawns, boss caves (Tek cave, Lava Golem, Iceworn, Labyrinth, etc), area entrances. Violations will be met with destruction of the offending structures and more depending on severity.

2. No excessive base spam. You can spam 15 foundations out from your base. What counts as your base is anything that isn't spam. Violations will be met with destruction of the spam.

3. No Meshing. Meshing counts as any entrance below/inside the mesh. Violations will be met with an instant tribe wipe.

4. No building in base spots that require strange methods to enter, like beds, chairs, or knockout. If you have questions about a spot make a ticket in the tickets channel of the Discord. Violations will be met with destruction of the offending structures.

5. No building tunnels into enemy bases. This includes putting tunnels on platforms.Violations will be met with removal of any raid spoils and further action depending on severity.

6. Platform creatures and rafts can ONLY have one side be fully covered. If the structure covers an entire side of the creature from view, the structure cannot be more than 1 wall wider than the creature itself. Your platform entity must be damageable. Essentially, don't take all the fun out of raiding by essentially protecting yourself from all turret fire.Violations will be met with removal of any raid spoils and further action depending on severity.



PvP Rules and General Rules

1. No Duping of items or dinos or anything. Violations will be met with a FULL tribe wipe.

2. No "Human" or "123" names. Your account AND player name must be unique. If you need help changing your name make a ticket in the tickets channel in the Discord. Violations will result in me giving you a funny name. Or wiping your tribe if you refuse to comply!

3. Tribe Name and Tribe Members must be the same across ALL maps. Essentially, do not get around the 6 man tribe limit or try to disguise yourself as another tribe. Violations will result in me removing tribe members from your tribe and changing your tribe name. If done maliciously, will result in a tribe wipe.

4. A FOB must be picked up from an enemy base once the raid is complete or abandoned. Violations will result in me destroying the FOB and any loot inside.

5. No using the Discord Tribe Log System to pretend to be another tribe and spy on their logs. Violations will result in a tribe wipe.

6. No Admin Abuse. Admins are not allowed to use their powers to give themselves an advantage over other players. The admin logs channel in the Discord helps keep us honest. If you have ANY suspicions, make a ticket in the tickets channel of the Discord. Violations will result in removal of admin status and full tribe wipe.

7. No Destroying/Killing things in the "Admin" tribe, unless told to by an event or admin. Violations could go up to a full tribe wipe depending on severity.

8. DO NOT revive the souls of event dinos. This includes ALL dinos present in events unless explicitly told you can. Violations will result in the dino and ALL of its children being killed. And may go up to a full tribe wipe depending on severity.

9. DO NOT clone supermutant dinos that you win from events. Violations will result in the cloned dino and the original being killed. And may go up to a full tribe wipe depending on severity.

10. DO NOT use the Sulfur Titan's beam to raid. It is much too OP. Violations could result in a full tribe wipe.

11. DO NOT PvP at the community center or any areas connected to it.

12. DO NOT use/create Desolatitan Bone Saddle BPs.

13. The Xiphias Hatz pick is NOT ALLOWED in any PVP scenario. Violations will be met with taking of any spoils and further action depending on severity.



If you have any questions or concerns about the rules, make a ticket in the tickets channel in the Discord and I'll fix it up.

content.title: Shop Information
content.text:
We have a comprehensive shop on The Cursed Ark.
Powered by "Resonant's Shop Mod" and Myself.

You can see the shop by Pressing F1 or opening it in the Radial Wheel from anywhere.

The shop has basically everything; dinos, resources, kits, and boss packs. The only thing the shop DOES NOT have is equipment, so no saddles, weapons, or blueprints.
Some equipment is available in kits.

You can buy stuff in the shop using the points you get by just being logged into the server. You get 50 points every 30 minutes.

Here's the important part though.

There is a 2nd shop. The admin shop, ran manually by myself.
To use this shop your tribe must be registered. Check out how to register in the general info channel in the Discord.
All the prices and products are the same except that the currency are those "BerryBush Seeds" you can find in all supply drops, cave drops, alpha drops, OSDs, and boss drops.

You can also obtain BBS (BerryBush Seeds) by donating to the server through our Tebex store. Check out the donation channel in the Discord for more info.
I really DON'T like P2W but there needs to be some incentive to donate. So I try to keep it balanced. This is neccesary if you want to keep all the maps we have.

You can ALSO obtain BBS by helping to advertise the server. 
Just post a pic of your contribution in the submissions channel in the Discord and make a ticket in the tickets channel in the Discord!
You can advertise the server once a day and will receive 500 BBS every time you do.

The OTHER important part.
Any dinos purchased through the admin shop are 50% off! This ONLY applies to dinos.

AND

BBS can be used to purchase a "Best of 5" version of any dino for 3x normal BBS price, so a "Best of 5" Tyrannosaurus would be 3750 BBS. Essentially you get 5 "rolls" on the dino you buy, and you get to keep the one with the best stats!

For a list of shop prices. Check out the Shop Prices page in this menu.

content.title: Custom Base Spots
content.text:
The Cursed Ark has a slew of custom base spots!

To view them and where they're located please consult the Custom Base Page in the info channel in the Discord.

content.title: Dino Modifications
content.text:
The Cursed Ark has some modifications made to dino spawn rates, and dino balancing.
All this information is listed below.


Dino Spawn Restrictions
The list below is mostly our restrictions on modded dinos.

Paddletail Spino -> 10 per map.
Antrodemus -> 15 per map (per variant).
Desolatitan -> 1 per map (per variant).
Tylosaur -> 5 per map.
Laelaps -> 15 per map.
Gigantophis -> 15 per map.
Moro-Rex -> DOESNT SPAWN.
Moro-Raptor -> DOESNT SPAWN.
Juvenile Zaldrir Dragon -> DOESNT SPAWN.
Young Zaldrir Dragon -> DOESNT SPAWN.
Adult Zaldrir Dragon -> ONLY ON some maps. On these maps it is 2 per map.
Elder Zaldrir Dragon -> DOESNT SPAWN.
Ancient Zaldrir Dragon -> DOESNT SPAWN.
Alpha Zaldrir Dragon -> DOESNT SPAWN.
Maeguana -> 10 per map (Astraeos can spawn 3x as many).
Livyatan -> 2 per map.
Edmontia -> 20 per map.
Nothosaurus -> 5 per map (per variant) (Astraeos can spawn 2x as many).
Minotaur -> ONLY ON Astraeos
Seahorse -> ONLY ONAstraeos
Cyclops -> ONLY ON Astraeos
Pyromane -> ONLY ON The Center & Scorched
Drakeling -> 16 per map (Per variant).
Vectispinus -> 10 per map (Per variant).
Tyrannodominator -> 2 per map (Per variant) (Astraeos can spawn 2x as many).
Alpha Tyrannodominator -> 1 per map. (Astraeos can spawn 2x as many).
Sulfur Titan -> ONLY ON Extinction and Astraeos. Where it is 1 per map.
Helicoprion -> 1 per map.
Dzungariotherium -> 15 per map (Per variant).
Alpha Dzungariotherium -> 2 per map.
Xiphias's Hatzegopteryx -> 3 per map.
Twee's Hatzegopteryx -> 3 per map.
Empirosaurus -> 10 per map.
Ledumahadi -> 10 per map.
Hydrovanta -> 30 per map. (Astraeos can spawn 2x as many)
WAK Spinosaurus -> 3 per map (Per variant).
Hapipalus -> 3 per map (Per variant) (Astraeos can spawn 2x as many).



Dino Modifications

Spinosaurus -> 50% more damage | 25% Faster.
Paddletail Spino -> 50% more damage | 30% more resistance | 50% more stamina.
(WILD ONLY) Desolatitan -> 100% more damage | 100% more resistance | 30% Faster.
Desolatitan -> 27.54% less damage | 20% less resistance.
Gargant Spino -> 25% Slower | 150% more stamina.
Monarch Rex -> 22.33% less damage | 20% more resistance | 25% Slower | 50% more stamina.
Griffin -> 30% Faster.
Ice Wyvern -> 40% more damage | 25% faster.
Juvenile Zaldrir Dragon -> 50% more damage | 50% more resistance.
Young Zaldrir Dragon -> 50% more damage | 50% more resistance | 10% Faster.
Adult Zaldrir Dragon -> 50% more damage | 50% more resistance | 20% Faster.
Elder Zaldrir Dragon -> 50% more damage | 50% more resistance | 30% Faster.
Ancient Zaldrir Dragon -> 50% more damage | 50% more resistance | 50% Faster.
Alpha Zaldrir Dragon -> 50% more damage | 50% more resistance | 50% Faster.
Tyrannodominator -> 50% more damage | 50% more resistance | 30% faster.
(WILD ONLY) Tyrannodominator -> 200% more damage | 100% more resistance | 30% faster.
Alpha Tyrannodominator -> 300% more damage | 300% more resistance | 50% faster.
Moro-Rex Gen 2 -> 75% more damage | 30% more resistance | 30% faster.
Rhyniognatha -> 35% more damage.
EVO Giga - > 50% more stamina.
Woolly Rhino -> 40% more damage.
(TAMED ONLY) Reaper King -> 50% more damage | 50% more resistance.| 20% faster.
Alpha Dzungariotherium - > 200% more damage | 200% more resistance | 50% faster.
Titanosaur -> Feeding is turned ON.
(TAMED ONLY) Xiphias's Hatzegopteryx -> 75% faster.
(WILD ONLY) Xiphias's Hatzegopteryx -> 300% more damage | 300% more resistance
(WILD ONLY) Twee's Hatzegopteryx -> 30% more resistance
(TAMED ONLY) Twee's Hatzegopteryx -> 30% more resistance | 20% faster
Rock Drake -> 54% more damage.
Megistotherium -> 50% faster.
Hapipalus -> 30% more damage.
(WILD ONLY) Hapipalus -> 300% more damage | 500% more resistance.
Managarmr -> Infinite Jumps | Infinite Strafes | Infinite Dashes | Double Ice Breath Range.
Ossidon -> 25% faster.
Carchar (BigAl) -> 35% faster.
EVO Mosasaurus -> 60% more damage | 25% faster.



Disabled Dinos

Some Dinos are disabled on Lost Colony, here is the list.
They are disabled via making them die in 1 hit, do 0 damage, and being unable to move.

Brachiosaurus
Carcharodontosaurus
Cyclcops
Desolatitan
Dreadnoughtus
Dzungariotherium

content.title: Mailbox Info (IMPORTANT)
content.text:
A mailbox is very useful on this server.

It's a storage box located at the community center, it serves as exactly its name, a mailbox.

A mailbox between your tribe and the Admins. The mailbox will have a 4 digit pin code of your choosing. And whenever you want to make a purchase using the admin shop, get compensation for a bug, or get a giveaway/event prize, it will all happen in your mailbox.

This system lets me help you without both of us needing to be on.

IMPORTANT

The Community Center is located on The Island near the Red Obelisk. All Obelisks on The Island have a teleporter on them that can go to the Community Center.


ALSO IMPORTANT
Make a ticket in the tickets channel in the Discord to have a mailbox made. Just give me your Tribe Name and the 4 digit pin code you want for it.
When you want to use your mailbox make another ticket and leave your BBS in your mailbox.


You ARE allowed to use your mailbox as a secure storage option.  As breaking another player's mailbox is illegal.

content.title: Events and Giveaways
content.text:
Here at The Cursed Ark we run all kinds of events and giveaways!

Events usually include, raid bosses, raid bases, treasure hunts, races, arena fights, tournaments, and many others.
I drop events at least once a week but oftentimes I do many events in a single week.
Sometimes I also go many weeks without doing an event, it is rather dependent on my personal life.

Giveaways usually include dinos, blueprints, saddles, resources, and other exotic rewards. 
I do giveaways very frequently, usually only a couple days between each one.

## Stay tuned to events in the Events channel in the Discord !
## Stay tuned to giveaways in the Giveaways channel in the Discord!

content.title: Offline Raid Protection
content.text:
The Cursed Ark has Offline Raid Protection.
Powered by "Hyper's Offline Raid Protection"

Offline Raid Protection (ORP) is a a structure that when placed down will make a radius around it under ORP.

The structure is craftable at an early level and is rather cheap.



Effects of ORP:

Infinite Turret Ammo
3x more structure resistance
3x Turret Damage



ORP will activate 10 minutes after all player's have logged off of a map, assuming no enemy is within range of your base.
ORP will decay after 2 weeks of no players logging in.
You can place as many ORP structures as you want!

content.title: New Player Protection
content.text:
The Cursed Ark has NPP (New Player Protection)!
Powered by "White Flag".

NPP is an invincible forcefield that lasts for 7 days once placed.
NPP will NOT protect you from PvP outside the forcefield though.



Rules to apply for NPP:

All members of your tribe must be younger than 7 days.
No members of your tribe can have ANY bosses completed.



Rules to follow when you have NPP.

You CANNOT start any PvP at ALL while under NPP or you will lose it.
You may participate in PvP events like raid bases, arena events, etc...
If you are the victim of NPP abuse make a ticket in the tickets channel in the Discord.
Completing Bosses during this time will not remove your NPP.

content.title: Tribe Log System
content.text:
You can now have all your tribe logs cluster wide directed to your own discord! 

This is a tutorial on how to do this.

Step 1: In your own discord, create the channel you want your tribe logs sent to. 
Step 2: Click the gear icon on your channel and go to "Integrations".
Step 3: Under "Webhooks" click "create webhook" .
Step 4: A webhook with a random name will be made. Click on it, then click "Copy webhook URL". Hold onto this.
Optional Step: Change the webhook's name and profile picture if you wish.

For all these past steps you will need to be an admin in your Discord. 

Step 6: Make sure your tribe name is the EXACT same across all maps as this is case sensitive. I would also go to each map to make sure no one else uses your tribe name.
Step 7: Make a ticket in the tickets channel in the Discord and say you want tribe log relay set up. Then present the webhook URL and your EXACT tribe name.
Everything you need to do is done. I'll take it from there.

PS: I will NOT be able to see your tribe logs as these logs will be sent to your own discord server. I wanted to mention this incase you're worried about privacy.

WARNING: If you change your tribe name the logs will STOP working and you will need to contact me to change it for your new name.

content.title: Known Issues
content.text:
This is a list of known bugs on the server.
You can report any not listed here by making a ticket in the tickets channel in the Discord.


Shop will often only display 50 packages. To fix this you need to kill yourself with the specimen implant suicide function.

Do not put vanilla cryos in upload as you wont be able to take them out.
